summary: Credit History feature for 'mumble' language tutor app - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API with pagination/filtering verified. Frontend page renders correctly with filter pills, transaction list, expandable rows showing LLM/STT/TTS breakdown, and Credit Rates info section. Sidebar has Credit History link in both expanded and collapsed modes.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests - minor HTTP status code difference, functionally correct

tests: test_usage_transaction_fields: PASSED (has type, user_id, amount, created_at, breakdown)
test_purchase_transaction_fields: PASSED (has type, user_id, credits_added, plan, created_at)
test_no_filter_returns_all_types: PASSED (returns both usage and purchase)

credit_history_page.title: PASSED - Shows 'Credit History' as h1
credit_history_page.subtitle: PASSED - Shows 'Track how your credits are earned and spent across conversations.'
credit_history_page.filter_pills: PASSED - All, Usage, Purchases filter pills with correct data-testid

filter_functionality.usage_filter: PASSED - Shows 16 usage transactions with negative (red) amounts
filter_functionality.purchase_filter: PASSED - Shows 2 purchase transactions with positive (green) amounts

transaction_display.usage_transactions: PASSED - Shows 'Conversation usage' with USAGE badge, negative credits in red
transaction_display.purchase_transactions: PASSED - Shows 'Plus Plan Purchase' with PURCHASE badge, +1000 credits in green

row_expansion.click_to_expand: PASSED - Usage rows expand on click
row_expansion.breakdown_details: PASSED - Shows LLM Tokens (600 in / 200 out), Speech-to-Text (2.5s audio), Text-to-Speech (300 chars)
row_expansion.balance_after: PASSED - Shows 'Balance after' with remaining credits (997)

credit_rates_info.section_visible: PASSED - Credit Rates section at bottom with data-testid='credit-rates-info'
credit_rates_info.llm_rate: PASSED - Shows '1 credit/1K input tokens, 3 credits/1K output tokens'
credit_rates_info.stt_rate: PASSED - Shows '0.3 credits per second of audio'

sidebar_links.expanded_sidebar: PASSED - Credit History link visible with History icon, navigates to /credit-history
sidebar_links.collapsed_sidebar: PASSED - Credit History icon (History) visible in collapsed sidebar

features_verified: GET /api/payments/credit-history returns paginated credit transactions for authenticated user
GET /api/payments/credit-history?type=usage filters to usage transactions only
GET /api/payments/credit-history?type=purchase filters to purchase transactions only
GET /api/payments/credit-history returns 403 without auth token (authentication enforced)
Filter pills (All, Usage, Purchases) work correctly to filter transactions
Transaction rows expand on click to show breakdown (LLM, STT, TTS details)
Purchase transactions show positive credits with green color (+1000)
Usage transactions show negative credits with red color (-3, -5, etc.)
Credit Rates info section is visible at bottom of page
Sidebar has 'Credit History' link with History icon in expanded mode
Sidebar has 'Credit History' icon in collapsed mode
Clicking Credit History link in sidebar navigates to /credit-history
critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: payments.py has GET /credit-history endpoint with pagination (page, limit) and type filtering
CORRECT: credit_service.py logs transactions with detailed breakdown (LLM tokens, STT seconds, TTS characters)
CORRECT: CreditHistoryPage.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
CORRECT: Filter pills properly update state and refetch data
CORRECT: TransactionRow component expands to show breakdown with animation
CORRECT: Credit Rates section displays accurate rates from credit_service.py constants
CORRECT: Sidebar.jsx has Credit History link in both DesktopSidebar and MobileSidebar with History icon
CORRECT: api.js has getCreditHistory function with page, limit, type parameters
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (9 transactions: 8 usage + 1 purchase)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit History feature complete. Seeded test user demo@mumble.com has 9 transactions (8 usage, 1 purchase). Backend returns 403 for unauthenticated requests (not 401). Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all key elements. Sidebar expands on hover showing Credit History link with History icon. Transaction rows expand on click for usage type only when breakdown data exists.
